title: Radiobotics - AI X-Ray Analysis for Musculoskeletal
problem: Radiologists face high workload and repetitive tasks. Musculoskeletal X-ray analysis is time-consuming and variation exists between interpreters.
solution: AI software (RBknee) that automatically analyzes X-rays for osteoarthritis and other musculoskeletal conditions, providing standardized measurements and classifications.
technology: Computer vision, ML, medical image analysis
regulatory_notes: CE marked as medical device. Radiologist assist tool.
varden_fit: Low — specialized radiology AI, not primary care infrastructure. Interesting example of Nordic AI diagnostic tool.
notes: Example of specialized AI diagnostics from Denmark. Similar to Corti's approach but for imaging.
